title: pelargonium × gracilescens
intro: Pelargonium × gracilescens is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium asperum and Pelargonium betulinum. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, colds, and sore throats due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × gracilescens include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation, soothe respiratory issues, and support immune function.
